description: Use this API to return complex fixed bus shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, cmpval = fxsdt2(ibus, id ,string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the units to be used. (input).

return_values.name: cmpval
return_values.description: Complex shunt in the units indicated by string. (output).

string.description: Actual shunt. ‘CMPVAL’ returned in MW Mvar.
Actual shunt. ‘CMPVAL’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Nominal shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘CMPVAL’ returned in MW Mvar.
Nominal shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘CMPVAL’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Nominal zero sequence shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘CMPVAL’ returned in per unit.
Nominal zero sequence shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘CMPVAL’ returned in MW Mvar.
Nominal zero sequence shunt (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘CMPVAL’ returned in units determined by the power output option setting.

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Shunt not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Bus type code is not 1, 2 or 3; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ returned.
Invalid value of ‘STRING’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Sequence data not in case for ‘STRING1’ = ‘PQZERO’, ‘PQZ’ or ‘O_PQZ’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
